Class DataBackup

java.lang.Object
bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.data.DataBackup
public class DataBackup extends Object
DataBackup provides automatic backup and rollback functionality for data files. It creates timestamped backups before saving and allows restoration if save fails. Features: - Automatic backup before each save - Rollback capability if save fails - Keeps last N backups (configurable, default 10) - Timestamped backup folders for traceability Usage: 
DataBackup backup = new DataBackup();
try {
    backup.createBackup();
    FlightBookingSystemData.store(fbs);
    backup.commit();
} catch (Exception e) {
    backup.rollback();
    throw e;
}

  • Constructor Details

    • DataBackup

      public DataBackup()

  • Method Details

    • createBackup

      public void createBackup() throws IOException
      Create a timestamped backup of all data files. Backup is stored in resources/data/backups/backup_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS/
      Throws:
      IOException - if backup creation fails

    • commit

      public void commit()
      Commit the changes and mark backup as successful. This prevents automatic rollback.

    • rollback

      public void rollback() throws IOException
      Rollback to the most recent backup. Restores all backed up files to the data directory.
      Throws:
      IOException - if rollback fails

    • restoreFromBackup

      public static void restoreFromBackup(String timestamp) throws IOException, FlightBookingSystemException
      Manually restore from a specific backup by timestamp.
      Parameters:
      timestamp - The timestamp of the backup to restore (e.g., "20250205_143022")
      Throws:
      IOException - if restore fails
      FlightBookingSystemException - if backup doesn't exist

    • listBackups

      public static List<String> listBackups() throws IOException
      List all available backups with their timestamps.
      Returns:
      List of backup timestamps
      Throws:
      IOException - if listing fails

    • getCurrentBackupPath

      public Path getCurrentBackupPath()
      Get the path to the current backup (for testing/debugging).

    • hasActiveBackup

      public boolean hasActiveBackup()
      Check if a backup is currently active.
